title: Darker Iron
description: Retexture of some iron blocks and items to be darker grey
body: Retextures some of the iron related items that would look good as darker iron. Some are simply recolored as darker grey, others are redesigned into a more iron-like texture. The following are recolored to darker grey: - Iron ingot - Iron nugget - Iron tools - Iron armors - Iron horse armor - Iron bars The following are remade with a rivetted iron styled texture: - Iron block - Iron door - Iron trapdoor ## License [Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)
